creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
Althougth apr1 has optional crypto support (with default off), 
	there is OPTION to compile it
	The APU's crypto support will be required for future www/apache24 port  
        (is required during configuration of Apache's mod_session_crypto module)

Fix: It's simple change of port's Makefile:

	OPTION named CRYPTO added, default is off (e.g. no change against current behavior)
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
